reviews.comment:
Carga nafta y andate, si llegas a la madrugada después de cruzar la conquistadora del desierto, no tenés ni para tomar café, un desastre. No entiendo como el ACA autoriza esa estación.

(Translated by Google)
Fill up on gas and get going. If you arrive at dawn after crossing the desert, you won't even have enough to drink coffee. It's a disaster. I don't understand how the ACA authorizes that station.
